data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The requirement for validation rules (regex, min/max, required) was not satisfied as the evidence provided does not cover all necessary field types. Specifically, the linked use case only confirms the presence of text, number, boolean, and dropdown field types, while lacking evidence for date, multi-select, URL, and color picker types. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the validation rules cannot be fully assessed without evidence for all specified field types.
gaps: Missing evidence for field types: date, multi-select, URL, color picker.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
